Welcome to StarStack

Pick a workout, stay consistent, and track your progress one day at a time.

Start Workout View Progress

Inspiration

A small push

“You can, you should, and if you're brave enough to start, you will.”

— Stephen King

Start fast

Less thinking

Choose intensity + equipment and press play. No scrolling, no decision fatigue.

Stay consistent

Track progress

Each day you do a workout, your calendar gets marked. Streaks make it easier to keep going.
